tooltips.cv_threshold: Coefficient of variation threshold for flagging high replicate variability. Values above this indicate inconsistent measurements.
tooltips.vif: Variance Inflation Factor - multiplier applied to standard error for indirect comparisons. Higher VIF means less precision.
tooltips.bsi: Background Stability Index - measures temporal stability of negative controls. Values near 1.0 indicate stable background.
tooltips.lod: Limit of Detection - the lowest signal reliably distinguishable from background noise (mean + 3*SD).
tooltips.loq: Limit of Quantification - the lowest signal that can be reliably quantified (mean + 10*SD).
tooltips.snr: Signal-to-Noise Ratio - ratio of signal amplitude to background noise. Higher is better (>10 is good, >20 is excellent).
tooltips.sbr: Signal-to-Background Ratio - ratio of signal to background level. Indicates fold elevation above background.
tooltips.r_squared: R-squared (R²) - coefficient of determination measuring how well the model fits the data. Range 0-1, higher is better.
tooltips.rmse: Root Mean Square Error - average magnitude of fit residuals. Lower values indicate better fit.
tooltips.k_obs: Observed rate constant - the apparent first-order rate constant for the kinetic reaction (min⁻¹).
tooltips.f_max: Maximum fluorescence - the plateau fluorescence value at reaction completion.
tooltips.t_lag: Lag time - delay before exponential phase begins, indicating initiation kinetics.
tooltips.ci_width: Confidence Interval Width - the span of the 95% CI. Narrower is more precise. Target is ±0.3 log₂ units.
tooltips.r_hat: R-hat convergence diagnostic - values near 1.0 indicate MCMC chains have converged. Should be <1.01.
tooltips.ess: Effective Sample Size - number of independent samples after accounting for autocorrelation. Should be >400.
tooltips.divergent: Divergent transitions - MCMC sampling failures indicating model issues. Should be zero or very few.
tooltips.icc: Intraclass Correlation Coefficient - proportion of variance due to grouping structure.
tooltips.fold_change: Fold Change - ratio of mutant to wild-type activity. Log₂ transformed for symmetry.
tooltips.direct_comparison: Direct comparison - constructs measured on same plate, highest precision (VIF=1.0).
tooltips.indirect_comparison: Indirect comparison - constructs connected through intermediate references, lower precision.
tooltips.unregulated: Unregulated construct - universal reference present on all plates, enables cross-family comparisons.
tooltips.wild_type: Wild-type (WT) - reference construct within each family, used as denominator for fold change.
tooltips.anchor: Anchor construct - reference point for comparisons. Unregulated is global anchor, WT is family anchor.
tooltips.precision_target: Precision target - desired CI width for fold change estimates. Default is ±0.3 log₂ units.
tooltips.negative_control: Negative control - wells with no template DNA, used to measure background fluorescence.
tooltips.blank_well: Blank well - wells for instrument background correction (no reaction mix).
tooltips.split_well: Split well - single reaction split across multiple wells for volume constraints.
tooltips.exclusion: Exclusion - flagged data point removed from analysis. Requires justification for audit trail.
tooltips.qc_flag: QC flag - quality control indicator marking potential issues for review.
